creator: bsd@abinet.ru
text:
Strange enough, poudriere didn't complain about this issues during test build. I've converted README.FreeBSD to UCS pkg-message and removed README entirely.

I hope this helps.

====> Running Q/A tests (stage-qa)
Notice: You have some Perl modules as dependencies but you do not have devel/p5-Module-CoreList installed, the perlcore QA check gets better results when using it, especially with older Perl versions.
====> Checking for pkg-plist issues (check-plist)
===> Parsing plist
===> Checking for items in STAGEDIR missing from pkg-plist
===> Checking for items in pkg-plist which are not in STAGEDIR
===> No pkg-plist issues found (check-plist)
=>> Checking for staging violations... done
